---
title: "campaign_updater.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\engine\campaign_updater.py"
loc: 69
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.52
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 6.04
overall_score: 2.91
---

## Intent
The `campaign_updater.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on CampaignUpdater, __init__, update_campaign, _get_new_traces. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CampaignUpdater, __init__, update_campaign, _get_new_traces. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [logging](file://logging)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic)

### Exports
- `CampaignUpdater`
- `__init__`
- `update_campaign`
- `_get_new_traces`
